name: Aman Verma
text: Rishi delivered our medical assistant MVP in a very short timeline without compromising quality. He took ownership of both AI behavior and API stability, and his communication with product and clinical teams was always clear and practical.

name: Priya Nair
text: I appreciated how Rishi handled complex debugging across prompt flows and backend services. He consistently brought structure to ambiguous problems and helped us reduce production incidents during major releases.

name: Rahul Mehta
text: Working with Rishi was smooth because he writes clean, maintainable code and thinks about long-term reliability. His approach to retries, fallbacks, and testing improved our confidence in every deployment.

name: Neha Sharma
text: Rishi collaborated closely with QA and made sure edge cases were covered early. The regression suite he introduced saved us from repeated breakages and made release cycles much more predictable.

name: Siddharth Rao
text: Rishi combines strong full-stack skills with practical AI engineering. He does not just build demos, he ships production-ready features that are observable, measurable, and genuinely useful to end users.

name: Kavya Iyer
text: From requirement discussions to final rollout, Rishi stayed focused on business outcomes. He explained technical trade-offs in simple terms and helped stakeholders make faster and better product decisions.
